creator: dr@domix.de
text:
xfce-3.1.1.tar.gz isn't fetchable from <http://www.xfce.org/archive/>
	nor from <ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/>.
	
	There seems to be only a xfce-3.1.2 tarball on 
	<http://www.xfce.org/archive/>, which appears to be the latest release.

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/xfce ; make
